summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trade Sovereign trading app - backend APIs working locally, frontend UI functional, external proxy routing issue identified

critical_bugs.endpoint: All API endpoints via external URL
critical_bugs.issue: External URL https://demobackend.emergentagent.com returns 'Route not found' for all API requests
critical_bugs.impact: External users cannot access any backend functionality

critical_bugs.issue: Invalid MongoDB ObjectID causes 500 Internal Server Error instead of proper error handling
critical_bugs.impact: Poor user experience with invalid requests

minor_issues.issue: Missing CORS headers in OPTIONS responses
minor_issues.impact: May affect browser CORS preflight requests

integration_issues.issue: Frontend configured to use external backend URL which is not routing properly

success_percentage.backend_localhost: 83.3% - Most APIs functional, good authentication and error handling
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - UI working excellently, minor warnings only

action_item_for_main_agent.critical: Fix external URL routing - https://demobackend.emergentagent.com is not properly routing to backend APIs
action_item_for_main_agent.medium: Add proper error handling for invalid MongoDB ObjectIDs to return 400/404 instead of 500
action_item_for_main_agent.info: Backend APIs working perfectly on localhost, frontend UI is beautiful and functional
